workExperiences.title: Data Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Configured and maintained a Change Data Capture (CDC) platform using Apache Kafka (KRaft), Debezium, Prometheus, and Grafana for data replication and monitoring.
Implemented CDC pipelines from Oracle to Oracle for 5 production tables using Oracle Database, Apache Kafka, and Debezium (Kafka Connect).

Implemented and maintained CDC pipelines from Oracle to Apache Iceberg for 10 production tables containing over 40 million records, using Debezium Kafka Connector and Apache Spark batch jobs scheduled via cron.

Developed custom Python-based Prometheus exporters to monitor Kafka offset lag, Apache Spark processing lag, and Debezium connector health, while performing Apache Iceberg table optimization and maintenance to support reliable production workloads.

workExperiences.title: Backend Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Developed 2 modular services consisting of a FastAPI gateway and a Kafka consumer layer using Confluent Kafka, deployed with multi-stage Docker images, Jenkins, and RedHat.
Implemented structured logging and built end-to-end transaction monitoring dashboards in Kibana on an existing ELK stack across 2 services.
Conducted stress testing with JMeter handling around 10,000 requests with >99% successful end-to-end delivery.
Migrated 15+ services from Flask to FastAPI, enhancing production performance and stability.
Created Swagger-based API documentation, cutting deployment time by 10% by removing the need for manual tech documentation.
Evaluated asyncpg vs. psycopg2 under 1,000 concurrent requests, with asyncpg achieving 100% successful connections compared to a ~50% failure rate with psycopg2

workExperiences.title: English Language Instructor
responsibilities: Taught English classes across 3 semesters, instructing and supporting a total of over 150 students.
Responsible for delivering lessons, providing feedback, and tracking student progress throughout the course.

workExperiences.title: Freelance Game Performance Tester
responsibilities: Conducted performance testing on 2 games across 4 graphics configurations, identifying bugs, graphical inconsistencies, and performance drops.
Compiled and delivered detailed reports on game stability and performance outcomes across multiple test scenarios.

workExperiences.title: Campus Ambassador of Danacita
responsibilities: Led campaigns to increase awareness about DanaCita's online loan platform for students.
Effectively communicated DanaCita's features and benefits to the student community.

workExperiences.title: Data Entry - DEMI Developers Batch 2
responsibilities: Created AI prompts for academic content and lecturer assistance.
Conducted data entry and content verification in alignment with the Student Handbook of President University.

organizationalExperiences.title: Member of Valorant Division
responsibilities: Promoted the tournament by distributing broadcast messages and engaging participants throughout the event.
Collaborated on planning the tournament format and managed live updates of the tournament brackets during the 3-day competition.
